Bash(echo "=== FINAL AUDIT SUMMARY ===" && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "Total routes in server.ts:" && \\
grep "^import.*from.*routes" /h/atlasux/backend/src/server.ts | wc -l && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "Total route files on disk:" && \\
ls -1 /h/atlasux/backend/src/routes/*.ts | wc -l && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "Orphaned routes \(files not imported\):" && \\
comm -23 /tmp/actual_routes.txt /tmp/imported_routes.txt | wc -l && \\
echo "" && \\
echo "Phantom routes \(imported but don't exist\):" && \\
comm -13 /tmp/actual_routes.txt /tmp/imported_routes.txt | wc -l)
